finding.summary: True peak is dangerously close to 0 dBFS, risking intersample clipping and distortion.
finding.probable_cause: Track volume is at 0 dB with no limiting or gain reduction, leaving no headroom for downstream processing.
finding.confidence_reason: Direct measurement of true_peak_db = -0.1 dBFS confirms the level is near full scale, a well-known risk regardless of program material.

evidence_refs.description: True peak level measured at -0.1 dBFS.

proposal.reason: Reducing track volume by 3 dB will shift the true peak away from 0 dBFS, creating safe headroom and reducing clipping risk.
